Name: Enhance emergency preparedness & response.
ShortName: Enhance emergency preparedness & response.
Notes: Enhance the quality of life for our community by investing in initiatives that enhance emergency preparedness and response.

Name: Efficient & effective services.
ShortName: Efficient & effective services.
Notes:
Maintain competitive and affordable rates while providing efficient and
effective services.

Name: Leveraging technology.
ShortName: Leveraging technology.
Notes: Continuously improve management and organizational structures and processes through the recruitment of a diverse workforce, prioritization of professional development and leadership training, and leveraging technology to create efficiencies that improve city services.

Name: Enhance proactive initiatives for risk mitigation and prevention
ShortName: Enhance proactive initiatives for risk mitigation and prevention
Notes:
• Strengthen public safety programs by fostering collaboration across the organization, and by focusing on proactive efforts to recognize and respond to emergent and evolving threats.
  • Provide community stakeholders with insights into potential environmental risks, promoting a coordinated response and proactive strategies to reduce vulnerabilities to natural and human-made hazards.
  • Enhance outreach, collaboration, and education initiatives with the public and stakeholders to build stronger partnerships, increase transparency, and promote community safety and awareness

Name: Strengthen response and recovery actions
ShortName: Strengthen response and recovery actions
Notes:
• Optimize emergency response times across all service areas to ensure swift, effective assistance whenever needed.
  • Provide emergency responders and recovery teams with the latest technology and resources to enhance readiness and efficiency in response and recovery efforts.
  • Modernize emergency response and management processes to align with industry best practices, ensuring agile and adaptable operations across all hazard types and incident scenarios.

Name: Enhance preparedness through strategic and proactive measures
ShortName: Enhance preparedness through strategic and proactive measures
Notes:
• Enhance emergency management planning, training, and processes to foster seamless interdepartmental collaboration and preparedness.
  • Strengthen support systems for emergency responders to ensure mental readiness and resilience thereby enhancing overall effectiveness.

Name: Strengthen interdepartmental alignment in Capital Project delivery.
ShortName: Strengthen interdepartmental alignment in Capital Project delivery.
Notes:
• Align and standardize ordinances and policies across departments.
  • Establish guidelines for effective interdepartmental communication during project delivery.
  • Identify opportunities to enhance efficiency in the project delivery process.

Name: Embrace technological advancement and innovation.
ShortName: Embrace technological advancement and innovation.
Notes:
• Identify technological opportunities to improve operational efficiencies and effectiveness.
  • Develop a framework for creating an accurate inventory of City infrastructure.
  • Determine opportunities for operational automation to minimize point system failures and enhance reliability.

Name: Promote safe, cost-effective asset and resource management.
ShortName: Promote safe, cost-effective asset and resource management.
Notes:
• Create an overall plan for managing assets throughout their life cycle.
  • Develop educational programs for the community and schools to promote utility efficiency and sustainability.
  • Enhance safety protocols to ensure quality work environments and service delivery.

Name: Strengthen utility system resilience and capabilities.
ShortName: Strengthen utility system resilience and capabilities.
Notes:
• Develop a plan to ensure that utility systems can meet both current and future service needs.
  • Develop a strategy to mitigate utility system vulnerability.
  • Develop a plan for implementation of system redundancies.

Name: Expand industry and legislative partnerships and presence.
ShortName: Expand industry and legislative partnerships and presence.
Notes:
• Identify opportunities to leverage partnerships through active participation in industry trade associations.
  • Actively monitor and participate in the regulatory policy and rulemaking process.
  • Develop a strategy to monitor, influence, and comment on proposed legislation that aligns with Garland’s goals.

Name: Optimize financial stewardship.
ShortName: Optimize financial stewardship.
Notes:
• Leverage technology to automate routine financial tasks and streamline reporting.
  • Expand financial transparency by developing real-time dashboards for Management, Council, and Citizens.
  • Connect the Strategic Plan and other departmental objectives with the financial plan by incorporating program utilization data into budget allocations.

Name: Foster accountability, continuous improvement, and risk mitigation.
ShortName: Foster accountability, continuous improvement, and risk mitigation.
Notes:
• Enhance risk management initiatives.
  • Expand audit follow-up through prioritized implementation.

Name: Develop and implement long-term growth strategies.
ShortName: Develop and implement long-term growth strategies.
Notes:
• Implement a Tax Optimization Strategy to balance revenue generation with community impact.
  • Conduct a comprehensive review of current processes and budgets, including revenue enhancements and cost reductions without compromising service quality.
  • Enhance the long-term financial planning models to connect to the Strategic Plan and Operational Plans to allow for plans to be benchmarked and changed based on market/circumstances.
  • Continue pursuing innovative measures that reduce long-term expenses and liabilities.
  • Enhance legislative and public affairs initiatives.

Name: Revitalize neighborhoods and commercial centers.
ShortName: Revitalize neighborhoods and commercial centers.
Notes:
• Develop targeted strategies to attract new residents.
  • Expand and diversify quality housing options to meet community needs.
  • Improve walkability and connectivity between residential and commercial areas.
  • Foster vibrant neighborhoods through investment in placemaking.

Name: Enhance the physical appearance of Garland’s built environment
ShortName: Enhance the physical appearance of Garland’s built environment
Notes:
• Implement industrial district improvements that enhance long-term economic viability
  • Enhance Garland’s regional image through branding and beautification efforts.
  • Revitalize key corridors and gateways to create a welcoming and visually appealing environment.

Name: Foster the creation of the Garland Vibe.
ShortName: Foster the creation of the Garland Vibe.
Notes:
• Incorporate placemaking principles into city development policies, projects, and processes.
  • Support the creation of unique and engaging public spaces.
  • Cultivate an environment that attracts and sustains a creative culture.

Name: Simplify and streamline the process of working with the City.
ShortName: Simplify and streamline the process of working with the City.
Notes:
• Provide multiple channels for service access and interactions.
  • Review and streamline processes to reduce hurdles when accessing city services.
  • Prioritize awareness of various communication styles and languages to ensure exceptional customer service.
  • Develop clear guides to help citizens navigate city processes easily, reducing confusion.

Name: Maintain high standards for service quality and consistency.
ShortName: Maintain high standards for service quality and consistency.
Notes:
• Define key performance indicators (KPIs) specific to each service area (e.g., response times, completion rates, citizen satisfaction) to measure and track service quality consistently.
  • Implement citywide customer service best practices.

Name: Implement community feedback mechanisms to continuously improve service delivery.
ShortName: Implement community feedback mechanisms to continuously improve service delivery.
Notes:
• Provide easy-to-use, accessible feedback opportunities allowing stakeholders to share their experiences.
  • Use feedback to identify patterns and trends in service delivery and incorporate this data into regular service improvement strategies.

Name: Become regionally competitive in attracting quality residential and commercial development.
ShortName: Become regionally competitive in attracting quality residential and commercial development.
Notes:
• Identify and recruit key businesses that align with Garland’s economic vision.
  • Develop incentive programs to attract high-wage and high-quality employers.
  • Develop and enhance business retention and expansion programs.

Name: Create local and regional visitor destinations.
ShortName: Create local and regional visitor destinations.
Notes:
• Expand lodging options to accommodate visitors and support tourism growth.
  • Implement targeted recruitment efforts for retail and hospitality businesses.
  • Leverage Garland’s natural assets to create distinctive recreational and entertainment experiences.
  • Develop a diverse inventory of experience destinations.

Name: Maximize return on public and private investments.
ShortName: Maximize return on public and private investments.
Notes:
• Strengthen development and redevelopment efforts to boost revenue sources.
  • Align economic incentives with the needs of key districts and industry sectors.

Name: Improve access to quality employment opportunities.
ShortName: Improve access to quality employment opportunities.
Notes:
• Expand workforce upskilling and education programs to support economic mobility.
  • Implement best practices in site selection to attract and retain skilled talent.

Name: Utilize technologies and processes to enhance service delivery and internal operations.
ShortName: Utilize technologies and processes to enhance service delivery and internal operations.
Notes:
• Deploy analytics tools to track performance metrics in real-time.
  • Review current technology used by departments to ensure it meets department and customer needs.
  • Automate department functions with tools such as AI where applicable.

Name: Pursue quality public and private development to enhance the community.
ShortName: Pursue quality public and private development to enhance the community.
Notes:
• Identify and promote areas within Master Plans where both public and private investment can spur economic growth and revitalization.
  • Collaborate with regional partners and developers on mixed-use projects that integrate diverse housing options, commercial/retail spaces, and public services.
  • Implement more efficient review and approval processes for developers to encourage investment and reduce delays.

Name: Implement strategic initiatives that further enhance service delivery.
ShortName: Implement strategic initiatives that further enhance service delivery.
Notes:
• Define expectation for meeting on-going service standards.
  • Create initiatives that encourage cooperation between departments for comprehensive solutions.
  • Use process improvement methodologies to reduce inefficiencies in service delivery.

Name: Establish the City as an employer of choice, focused on sustaining a skilled and agile workforce, equipped to meet the ever-evolving needs of the Garland community.
ShortName: Employer of choice, sustaining a skilled and agile workforce
Notes:
• Design and maintain fiscally sustainable pay and benefit strategies, in support of the needs of the current and future workforce.
  • Develop and implement strategic initiatives and benchmarks that support a workforce that is responsive to and reflective of Garland’s customers and community.
  • Align workforce-focused processes and guidelines with governing regulations, operations, and industry best practices.
  • Build a high-performing workforce through deliberate efforts in support of skills, career, and leadership development.

Name: Provide places, spaces, and facilities that foster a strong sense of community while enriching the lives of residents and visitors.
ShortName: Strong sense of Community
Notes:
• Invest in renewing and modernizing amenities.
  • Maintain amenities to ensure they are safe, welcoming, and accessible to all.
  • Engage the community to increase participation.

Name: Create dynamic experiences for all ages through diverse programming, events, and services.
ShortName: Diverse programming, events, and services.
Notes:
• Support and expand the opportunities for health and wellness, learning, creativity, arts, culture, heritage, and fun.
  • Increase awareness and participation through innovative and consistent marketing and communications.
  • Foster collaborative partnerships to amplify impact.

Name: Maintain a standard of excellence through continuous improvement and community engagement.
ShortName: Excellence through continuous improvement and community engagement.
Notes:
• Pursue certifications, accreditations, awards, and recognitions.
  • Evaluate practices regularly, providing opportunities for internal and external feedback.
  • Invest in innovation and staff development to protect and promote stewardship of resources.

Name: Drive economic growth through recruitment of new businesses while facilitating a network of resources to help existing entrepreneurs thrive.
ShortName: Drive economic growth through recruitment of new businesses.
Notes:
• Increase awareness of current and future opportunities.
  • Invest in revitalization efforts.
  • Establish networks and partnerships that attract and retain developers, business owners, and more.

Name: Create pedestrian friendly destinations that attract visitors and inspire residents to shop, dine, and play.
ShortName: Create pedestrian friendly destinations.
Notes:
• Continue to develop places, spaces and facilities that encourage walkability.
  • Maintain infrastructure and aesthetics, promoting a safe, welcoming, and accessible environment.
  • Promote Downtown Garland as a recognized entertainment district.

Name: Increase digital maturity
ShortName: Increase digital maturity
Notes:
Digital capability is what a company requires to transform itself into a sustainable, relevant, and successful business by using technology as an enabler.

The Digital Needs Assessment (DNA) is an online tool that, based on a questionnaire, assesses digital maturity across eight dimensions by asking 41 questions including Strategy, culture, organization, processes, technology as well as customers, and partners.
NotesPlainText:
Digital capability is what a company requires to transform itself into a sustainable, relevant, and successful business by using technology as an enabler.
The Digital Needs Assessment (DNA) is an online tool that, based on a questionnaire, assesses digital maturity across eight dimensions by asking 41 questions including Strategy, culture, organization, processes, technology as well as customers, and partners. 
2022-09-28 06:53:02 Pal's Pets ranked below 3 out of 5
